name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature for pi-app
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

**Problem this solves**
What problem does this feature address? Is your workflow blocked by something missing?

**Proposed solution**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

**Alternatives considered**
What other approaches have you considered? Why is this one better?

**Workarounds today**
What do you currently do to work around this? How painful is it?

**Additional context**
Add any other context, screenshots, or examples here.
